The orange square is still at [12, 17], same as before. So clicking it again didn't move it further. The white star is not listed separately (probably merged with the orange square).
So the orange square moved once (from [11, 16] to [12, 17]) and then stopped. Maybe it needs to be clicked from a different position, or maybe I need to click something else to move it further.
Let me try clicking the gray diamond at [11, 26] to see if the orange square moves toward it.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the game mechanics. So far I've observed:
1. Clicking the purple ring moved the purple square from [35, 44] to [18, 53] (toward the ring)
2. Clicking the gray diamond at [4, 17] moved the white star there but didn't move the orange square
3. Clicking the orange square moved it from [11, 16] to [12, 17] and the gray diamond at [4, 17] disappeared
4. Clicking the orange square again didn't move it further
Maybe the mechanic is:
- Clicking a ring/diamond moves the white star there
- Clicking a colored square moves it one step along the trail toward the nearest ring/diamond
- The colored square can only move when the white star is on it
So the orange square moved from [11, 16] to [12, 17] when I clicked it. Now I need to click it again to move it further, but it didn't move. Maybe I need to click it from a slightly different position, or maybe the white star needs to be on it first.
Actually, looking at the image, the white star IS on the orange square. So maybe the orange square can only move one step at a time, and I need to click something else to "activate" the next move.
